user.title: Connect to Adafruit IO
user.description: Enter your Adafruit IO credentials. Find your API key at **io.adafruit.com** → My Key.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Adafruit IO — check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Adafruit IO account is already configured.

init.title: Select Groups to Sync
init.description:
Choose which Adafruit IO feed groups to bring into Home Assistant.

Each group becomes a **device**; each feed inside it becomes an **entity**.

group_feeds.title: Configure feeds — {group_name}
group_feeds.description:
Set the entity type, sync direction, and optional unit for each feed in **{group_name}**.

**Feeds in this group:** {feeds}

*{remaining} group(s) left to configure after this.*

**Entity types:** sensor (read-only value), switch (on/off), number (slider/input), text (string)
**Direction:** *AIO → HA* means HA is read-only. *Bidirectional* lets HA write back to AIO.
**Unit** is shown in the HA UI and is only meaningful for sensor and number types.

abort.no_groups: No Adafruit IO feed groups found. Create a group at io.adafruit.com first.
